events.title: From Interface to Agency: A New Discourse for Design and AI
events.location: UC Berkeley Campus (specific venue likely listed on event page)
events.description: A new discourse for design and AI, exploring the transition from interface-centric design to agency-focused approaches.

events.title: The Injustice of Noah's Curse (Justin Michael Reed)
events.description: A lecture discussing 'The Injustice of Noah's Curse' presented by Justin Michael Reed.

events.title: Silkroad Ensemble with Rhiannon Giddens, Sanctuary: The Power of Resonance and Ritual
events.description: The Silkroad Ensemble, featuring Rhiannon Giddens, performs 'Sanctuary: The Power of Resonance and Ritual'.

events.title: Drum Tao
events.description: A dynamic performance by the Japanese drumming group Drum Tao.

events.title: Drum Tao
events.description: A dynamic performance by the Japanese drumming group Drum Tao.

events.title: Théotime Langlois de Swarte, violin and Justin Taylor, harpsichord
events.description: A classical performance featuring Théotime Langlois de Swarte on violin and Justin Taylor on harpsichord.

events.title: Kaffeeklatsch
events.description: A social gathering event, traditionally a coffee and cake meeting.

events.title: California Legislature: Previewing the Year Ahead in California State Housing Policy
events.description: A preview of the upcoming year in California State Housing Policy by the California Legislature.

events.title: Mark Twain Papers and Project Open House
events.description: An open house event showcasing the Mark Twain Papers and Project.

events.title: Bate-Papo
events.description: A social conversational event.

events.title: Curator's Tour: Tausif Noor on Rhapsody: Works from the Cooper Rosenwasser Collection
events.description: A guided tour by curator Tausif Noor, focusing on works from the Cooper Rosenwasser Collection.

events.title: California Live!: Alone in the Algorithm: Human Connection in the Age of AI
events.description: A live discussion on human connection in the age of AI and algorithms.

events.title: Tea with Tracy (On Campus Session)
events.description: An on-campus session of 'Tea with Tracy', the CIO, for informal discussions.

events.title: CDP Spring Research Symposium: A Symposium honoring Distinguished Professor Emeritus Jeremy Thorner
events.organizer: Molecular and Cell Biology, UC Berkeley
events.location: Jarvis Auditorium, Grimes Engineering Center, UC Berkeley
events.description: A research symposium honoring Distinguished Professor Emeritus Jeremy Thorner, focusing on 'Saccharomyces cerevisiae: The Very Model of a Modern Model Organism'.

events.title: David Finckel, cello and Wu Han, piano
events.description: A classical music performance by cellist David Finckel and pianist Wu Han.

events.title: Conversación | Chile hoy: una conversación con Javiera Manzi Araneda y Claudio Alvarado Lincopi
events.description: A conversation about contemporary Chile with Javiera Manzi Araneda and Claudio Alvarado Lincopi.

events.title: Time Series As A Unit Square: Towards a Compute Efficient Foundation Model (Devavrat Shah, MIT)
events.description: A seminar by Devavrat Shah from MIT on compute-efficient foundation models for time series data.

events.title: Biohacking: Law, food systems, and the future of optimization
events.description: A discussion on biohacking, its legal implications, food systems, and future optimization.

events.title: Post Ramadan Market
events.description: Celebrate the end of Ramadan with a Muslim-inspired market featuring food, vendors, and crafts. Free for UC Berkeley students.

events.title: Louise Mozingo | Public Land, Public Space, Public Discourse
events.description: A lecture by Louise Mozingo on the topics of public land, public space, and public discourse.

events.title: Activity-based protein profiling – target and ligand discovery on a global scale
events.organizer: Molecular and Cell Biology, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar on activity-based protein profiling for target and ligand discovery.

events.title: The Inaugural UC Berkeley School of Public Health John Swartzberg Lecture
events.organizer: UC Berkeley School of Public Health
events.description: The inaugural lecture of the John Swartzberg Lecture series, hosted by the School of Public Health.

events.title: JupyterHub Security Workshop
events.description: A workshop focusing on security aspects of JupyterHub.

events.title: Kamran Anwar | Songs of the Sufi: The Untold Story of Classical Qawwali
events.description: Kamran Anwar presents 'Songs of the Sufi: The Untold Story of Classical Qawwali'.

events.title: 2026 Herb Caen Lecture: Press Freedom in Peril
events.description: The 2026 Herb Caen Lecture, addressing the critical issue of press freedom.

events.title: Arbitraging China's platform economy in the Silicon Savanna
events.description: A presentation on arbitraging China's platform economy within the 'Silicon Savanna' context.

events.title: Dynamic analyses reveal novel pathways that shape CD8+ T cell differentiation with tumor progression
events.organizer: Molecular and Cell Biology, UC Berkeley
events.location: 100 Genetics & Plant Biology Building, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar on dynamic analyses revealing novel pathways in CD8+ T cell differentiation and tumor progression.

events.title: Grad Student Appreciation Patio Party
events.organizer: Student Union at UC Berkeley, Graduate Social Club, Grad Division
events.description: A patio party for graduate students to enjoy tasty bites and socialize, in partnership with the Graduate Social Club and Grad Division. Free for UC Berkeley Graduate students.

events.title: Nonsense-mediated mRNA decay in human health and disease: Reframing the role of FMRP in Fragile X Syndrome
events.organizer: Molecular and Cell Biology, UC Berkeley
events.location: 125 Li Ka Shing Center, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar on nonsense-mediated mRNA decay and the role of FMRP in Fragile X Syndrome.

events.title: International Conference on Big Data Computer Science and Information (ICBDCSI)
events.description: A conference focusing on big data, computer science, and information.

events.title: OSPO Monthly Knowledge Exchange: April
events.organizer: College of Computing, Data Science, and Society (CDSS)
events.description: Monthly online discussion and knowledge exchange to shape the future of open source at UC Berkeley.

events.title: Two Genomes, One Balance: Mitochondrial and Nuclear DNA Stability
events.organizer: Molecular and Cell Biology, UC Berkeley
events.location: 100 Genetics & Plant Biology Building, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar exploring the balance between mitochondrial and nuclear DNA stability.

events.title: Coupling ER proteostasis and mitochondria function through Derlins
events.organizer: Molecular and Cell Biology, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar on the coupling of ER proteostasis and mitochondria function via Derlins.

events.title: UC Berkeley Grad Slam Competition
events.location: Sutardja Dai Hall, Banatao Auditorium, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Cheer on Berkeley grad students as they showcase their research in a series of three-minute talks.

events.title: Circular RNA Immunity
events.organizer: Molecular and Cell Biology, UC Berkeley
events.location: 100 Genetics & Plant Biology Building, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar focusing on the role of circular RNA in immunity.

events.title: Crafter Dark – DIY Shirt Patches
events.organizer: Student Union at UC Berkeley (in partnership with Cub Concerts)
events.location: 1st Floor of MLK Jr. Building, Game Zone Area, UC Berkeley
events.description: A creative workshop to make your own DIY shirt patches, hosted in partnership with Cub Concerts. Free for UC Berkeley students.

events.title: Cultural Analytics series: Talk with Kyle Booten 'Writing With and Beyond AI: Fieldnotes from Computer-Mediated Poetry'
events.description: A talk by Kyle Booten on writing with and beyond AI, focusing on computer-mediated poetry.

events.title: Cultural Analytics series: Discussion with Kyle Booten
events.description: A discussion session following Kyle Booten's talk on computer-mediated poetry and AI.

events.title: Movie Night: Legally Blonde
events.description: An enjoyable evening screening of the charming and empowering film 'Legally Blonde'. Free for UC Berkeley students.

events.title: Mobile Genomic Architects in Development and Cancer: Transposons and ecDNA
events.organizer: Molecular and Cell Biology, UC Berkeley
events.location: Jarvis Auditorium, Grimes Engineering Center, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar on mobile genomic architects in development and cancer, focusing on transposons and ecDNA.

events.title: Building Open Connected Scientific Data Products for the Cryosphere Hackdays
events.description: A multi-day hackathon focused on building open and connected scientific data products for the cryosphere.

events.title: Cynthia A. Chan Memorial Lecture
events.organizer: Molecular and Cell Biology, UC Berkeley
events.description: The Cynthia A. Chan Memorial Lecture.

events.title: Deciphering how viruses navigate host species barriers using a fibroblast zoo
events.organizer: Molecular and Cell Biology, UC Berkeley
events.location: 245 Li Ka Shing Center, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar on how viruses navigate host species barriers, utilizing a 'fibroblast zoo' approach.

events.title: Celebrate Mentorship at Cal for 2026!
events.location: Alumni House, Toll Room, UC Berkeley
events.description: An event to recognize outstanding faculty and graduate students for their mentorship accomplishments.

events.title: Unmasking cryptic TDP-43 targets in ALS
events.organizer: Molecular and Cell Biology, UC Berkeley
events.location: 125 Li Ka Shing Center, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar on unmasking cryptic TDP-43 targets in Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS).

events.description: An event to document biodiversity on campus during the spring season.

events.description: A virtual informal discussion session with CIO Tracy Shinn.

events.description: A speaker series event with Simone Zhang on risk assessment tools, court practices, and fairness perceptions.

events.title: Community Day (Explore Community Service Orgs)
events.description: Explore community service student organizations on campus. Free for UC Berkeley students.

events.description: A summit bringing together the open source community across the University of California system.

events.description: An on-campus session of 'Tea with Tracy', the CIO, for informal discussions.

events.title: HOLD for Sustainability Celebration
events.description: A celebration focused on sustainability initiatives and achievements.

events.title: Drag Bingo
events.description: An unforgettable night of Drag Bingo filled with laughter, prizes, and treats.

events.title: Study Jam

events.description: An event for students to unwind and recharge before exams. Free for UC Berkeley students.

events.description: Monthly meetup for the Open Source Program Office, including a fireside chat, Q&A, and community gathering. Drinks and snacks provided.

events.description: A technology seminar by Prof. Aditya Varma Muppala on affine virtual arrays for millimeter-wave imaging and metrology.

events.location: Hogan Room, Cory Hall (room 521), UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar on high reliability HfO2 based FeFETs for memory and compute-in-memory applications by Prof. Kechao Tang.

events.location: Berkeley Way West 8th floor, UC Berkeley
events.description: A dissertation talk on conditional generative modeling for biomolecular design.
